title: 思いっきり笑ってほしいから

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...Hm? Is that...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
She looks busy... I wonder what happened? I hope
she's not pushing herself.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your advice, by the way! Since
then, I've been collecting opinions from a bunch
of friends!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This must be about that "game with no winners or
losers" question. I didn't really think through my
answer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But once she explains, her motivations all make
sense. She wants to get Maruzensky to fully
immerse herself in a game without worrying about
others.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to try out every single idea, so give me
your honest opinion! First off...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Shadows exist everywhere, in every generation.
Get my drift?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
...A game of hide-and-seek on turf. This game of
darkness has lasted through the ages! Nothing is
impossible! You must become the turf!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: How's this, Trainer? Think you can find me?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Her head bobs in and out of sight. Though she's
wearing a cloak that blends in with the turf, it's
not enough to camouflage her.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Urk, I can't be the turf after all... One does not become the turf, one must run on the turf.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Well, a game's got to be thrilling, right? A game
where the luckiest one wins sounds fair to me.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Do a one-draw game, no tricks. That would really
heat things up!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: All right, it's your turn, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We play countless rounds of Old Maid and
Doubt, even roping in other players to join. But
Sakura Chiyono O is too easy to read, and she
loses every game...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
No waaay?! Everyone's way too good! I guess the
king wears a tight mask!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I see. Then, how about a game where you guess
tea variety?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You may guess wrong, but there's no need to
declare a winner. I believe it would make for a
wonderful experience.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Um, I'll have to remember the varieties first! Learn
each one's taste and smell...
Okay, I'm good to go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O gulps down the tea, doing her
best to remember the taste. But she ingests far
too much, and...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I c-can't drink any more... I was going to be the
best at this game too... Too much tea will make
you have to go—Urp...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I think my stomach has settled down. That
was almost a disaster...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It's not so easy to find a game with no winners or
losers. I guess playing on your own would work,
but...
choice_data_list:
What's something that you're good at, Chiyono
O?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Working with her strengths and preferences could
be a good starting point.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
My strengths and preferences... I'm pretty good
at karuta, proverbs, and... Oh, my dad taught me
sumo stomping and how to hold a teppo...
choice_data_list:
A teppo, as in a gun? Tell me you just mean
target shooting at festivals...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: No, not that teppo. It actually has to do with sumo...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Now let's see... Targets, festivals, and a game
where everyone wins...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh! This might just work!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for the tip! I'll need some
volunteers to help with all the preparations, but
it's definitely doable! I'll... make it happen!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Okay! This is gonna be great! Trainer, I'll invite you once everything's ready! It's time to Chiyono Go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Looks like she has a plan on her hands. Sakura
Chiyono O's eyes gleam with excitement as she
pumps her fists in the sky.
